The Boltic Workflow API enables programmatic creation, management, and execution of automation workflows. Workflows are visual, no-code automation sequences that connect triggers with actions across 500+ integrations. The API supports HTTP-triggered workflows with customizable responses, scheduled executions, and webhook-based triggers. Workflows can incorporate integration, transformation, and destination actions with support for multiple AI providers.
